22.6: ¶ Bu ngeen doxee ba yem ci tàggum picc ci seenu yoon, mu nekk ci garab gu mu mana doon, mbaa ci suuf, cuuj ya mbaa nen ya nekk ca, te yaay ja bóof ca kaw cuuj ya, mbaa nen ya, buleen boole jël yaay ja ak cuuj ya.
22.7: Fexeleen ba bàyyi yaay ja, te jël cuuj ya, ndax ngeen baaxle te gudd fan.
22.8: ¶ Su ngeen dee tabax kër gu bees, sàkkal-leen seen kawum taax, ab feguwaay, bala caa nit a daanoo, àqu deret topp seen kër.
22.9: ¶ Buleen ji ci seen tóokëru reseñ, weneen wirgo, lu ko moy lépp ay doon céru sellnga bu ngeen dul saña jariñoo: li jóge ci jiwu mi rax reseñ ji, ak itam meññeefum reseñ ji.
22.10: Buleen ràngandoo nag ak mbaam, di leen rijjiloo.
22.11: ¶ Buleen sol ndimol njaxas lu ñu raxe kawaru gàtt ak wëñu lẽe.
22.12: ¶ Ay cimbir-cimbir nag ngeen di def ci ñeenti weti malaanum sàngukaay mu ngeen di sàngoo.
22.13: ¶ Ku jël jabar, dëkkoo ko, ba noppi jéppi ko,
22.14: di ko tuumaal, di teg lu ñaaw ci deram, naan: «Ndaw sii ma jël, ba ma àggee ci moom, fekkuma ko janq,»
22.15: su boobaa na baayu ndaw si ak ndeyam, jël firndey ndaw la, yóbbu ko ba ca kanam magi dëkk ba, ca bunt dëkk ba.
22.16: Su ko defee baayu ndaw si ne mag ñi: «Sama doom laa mayoon waa jii jabar; mu walbatiku jéppi ko.
22.17: Mu ngii di ko tuumaal, naan: “Fekkuma sa doom ji janq.” Te sama ndawal doom a ngii!» Nañu tàllal malaan ma ca kanam magi dëkk ba.
22.18: Su loolu amee, na magi dëkk booba jàpp waa ji, yar ko.
22.19: Nañu ko daan téeméeri donji xaalis, jox ko baayu ndaw si, ndax moo yàq deru janqub Israyil. Jabaram lay doon ba tey, te du ko saña wacc giiru dundam.
22.20: ¶ Waaye su tuuma ji dee dëgg, te giseesul lenn ndaw ca ndaw sa,
22.21: nañu yóbbu ndaw sa ba ca bunt kër baayam, te góori dëkk bi dóor koy doj ba mu dee, ndax moo def jëf ju gàccelu ci digg Israyil, di gànctoo kër baayam. Noonu ngeen di tenqee lu bon ci seen biir.
22.22: ¶ Bu ñu fekkee kuy tëdde ku am jëkkër; ka ko tëdde ak ka ñu tëdde, dee mooy seen àtte, ñoom ñaar ñépp, ngeen tenqee ko lu bon ci Israyil.
22.23: ¶ Su ab janq digoo ak waayam ab séy, gannaaw gi keneen dajeek moom ci biir dëkk bi, tëdde ko,
22.24: génneleen leen ñoom ñaar, ba ca bunt dëkk booba, ngeen dóor leen ay doj ba ñu dee, ndax ndaw si moo yuuxuwul woon wall, te muy ca biir dëkk ba, te waa ji it moo jabaroo jabaru moroomu góoram. Noonu ngeen di tenqee lu bon ci seen biir.
22.25: ¶ Su fekkee ne ci àll bi la waa ji dajeek ndaw, si digook keneen ab séy, mu jàpp ko, tëdde ko, nag, waa ji ko tëdde doŋŋ la dee di àtteem.
22.26: Waaye ndaw si deesu ko def dara. Bàkkaar bu dee di àtteem toppu ko ca, ndax ni ku song moroomam, bóom ko rekk, ni la mbir moomu deme,
22.27: nde biir àll ba mu dajeek ndaw sa, bu ndaw sa yuuxu woon it, du am ku ko wallu.
22.28: ¶ Ku dajeek as ndaw, te mu dib janq bu digoowul ak keneen ab séy, su ko jàppee, tëdde ko, ba ñu gis leen,
22.29: kooka tëdde ndaw sa, day jox baayu ndaw sa juróom fukki donji xaalis. Jabaram lay doon it, gannaaw moo ko jabaroo, te du ko saña fase, giiru dundam.

23.1: ¶ Bu kenn jël jabaru baayam, di teddadil lalu baayam.
23.2: ¶ Ku ñu mor mbaa ñu dagg ngóoraam, du bokk ci ndajem gëmkati Aji Sax ji.
23.3: Ku dul doomu yoon du bokk ci ndajem gëmkati Aji Sax ji. Ku askanoo ci moom it, ba ca fukkeelu maas ga, du bokk ci ndajem gëmkati Aji Sax ji.
23.4: Ab Amoneen mbaa ab Mowabeen du bokk ci ndajem gëmkati Aji Sax ji. Ku askanoo ci ñoom it, ba ca fukkeelu maas ga, du bokk ci ndajem gëmkati Aji Sax ji mukk,
23.5: ndax la ñu leen dabewul woon aw ñam, mbaa am ndox, ca yoon wa, ba ngeen génnee Misra, xanaa di fey Balaam doomu Bewor ma bokk Petor ca Aram Naarim, ngir mu sàbbi leen.
23.6: Waaye seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji moo nanguwula déglu Balaam; kàddug yàqe ga la leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji soppil barke, ndax seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji da leena sopp.
23.7: Buleen sàkku mukk jàmmu ñooñu mbaa seen njariñ, seen giiru dund, ba fàww.
23.8: ¶ Buleen bañ ab Edomeen, ndax seen mbokk la. Buleen bañ nitu Misra, ndax ay doxandéem ngeen woon ca seenum réew.
23.9: Ñi soqikoo ci ñaari xeet yooyii, ca ñetteelu maas ga, te di seeni sëtaat nag, sañ nañoo bokk ci ndajem gëmkati Aji Sax ji.
23.10: ¶ Bu ngeen génnee ba fàkk ab dal, ngir jànkoonte ak seeni noon, nangeen sàmmu ci lépp lu aay.
23.11: Su amee ci seen biir ku setul, ndax géntu guddi gu ko dikkal, na génn dal bi, ca biti, te bumu duggaat ci biir dal bi.
23.12: Bu ngoon di jubsi na sangu, ba jant bi so, mu doora délsi ci biir dal bi.
23.13: Te sàkkleen bérab bu génn dal bi, ngeen di fa dem, di suturluji.
23.14: Na ngaska bokk ci seeni fàgguwaay, ndax su ngeen suturlujee ca biti ba noppi, moom ngeen di gase, ba suul seeni jonkan.
23.15: Ndax seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji mooy dem ak a dikk ci seen biir dal bi, ngir xettli leen, ba jébbal leen seeni noon. Kon nag seenub dal daa wara sell, ngir Aji Sax ji ñàkka gis fi seen biir, lenn lu tegginewul, ba dëddu leen.
23.16: ¶ Gannaaw loolu buleen delloo ab jaam bu làqu ci yeen, te rëcce ci ab sangam.
23.17: Ci yeen lay toog, ci seen biir, bérab ba mu taamu, ci benn bi ko gënal ci seeni dëkk, te buleen ko néewal doole.
23.18: ¶ Gànc bu jigéen buy gànctul ay tuur, bumu am ci biir jigéeni Israyil, te gànc bu góor buy gànctul ay tuur, bumu am ci góori Israyil.
23.19: Buleen indi mukk ci seen biir kër Yàlla Aji Sax ji, peyooru gànc bu jigéen, mbaa bu góor, ngir wépp xas wu ngeen namma wàccoo googu peyoor, ndax yooyu yaar yépp, seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji seexlu na ko.
23.20: ¶ Buleen teg seen mbokkum bànni Israyil tegandaayal xaalis, mbaa tegandaayal ñam, mbaa tegandaayal mboolem bor bu tegandaay tege.
23.21: Ab doxandéem, sañ ngeen koo sàkku tegandaay, waaye seen mbokkum bànni Israyil, buleen ko sàkku tegandaay. Su ko defee seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji mooy barkeel mboolem seenu ñaq, ca réew ma ngeen jëm, ngir nanguji ko.
23.22: ¶ Su ngeen xasalee seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, aw xas, buleen ko yeexa wàccool, ndax kon seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji du leen ko ñàkka topp, te kon muy seen bàkkaar.
23.24: Li seen làmmiñ tudd, sàmmooleen koo jëfe na ngeen ko xasale woon seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ci seen sagoy bopp, ak seen kàddug bopp.
23.25: ¶ Bu ngeen duggee ci seen tóokëru reseñu moroom, lekkleen ca reseñ ja lu leen neex ba suur, waaye seen ndab, buleen ko ca yeb.
23.26: Bu ngeen duggee ci seen toolu peppu moroom, fekk mu ñor, sàkkeleen seen loxo ca gub ya, waaye ab sàrt, buleen ko xàccil seen peppu moroom.

24.1: ¶ Ku jël jabar, ba gannaaw gi xoolatu ko bëtu yiw, ndax lu tegginewul lu mu ko gisal, su ko bindalee kayitu pase, teg ko ci loxoom, ba yiwi ko, mu jóge këram,
24.2: su jógee ca kër ga, dem ba mujj doon jabaru keneen,
24.3: su ko jëkkëram ju mujj jooju jéppee, bindal ko kayitu pase, teg ko ci loxoom, ba yiwi ko, mu jóge këram, mbaa su jëkkëram jooju ko mujja jël faatoo,
24.4: su boobaa jëkkëram ju jëkk ja ko yiwi woon du ko saña jëlaat jabar, gannaaw ba ndaw sa sobewoo noonu, ndax loolu lu jomblu la fi kanam Aji Sax ji, te waruleena indi bàkkaar ci biir réew mi leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji di moomale.
24.5: ¶ Ku jël ab séet du bokk ci gàngoor gu jëm xare, te deesu ko sas lenn. Day moom boppam atum lëmm, ngir toog këram, di bégal jabaram ji mu jël.
24.6: ¶ Buleen tayleloo kenn ñaari doji wolukaayam, ci bor bu mu leen ameel. Buleen ko tayleloo wenn doj wa féete kaw sax, ndax kon bakkanam ngeen def ub tayle.
24.7: ¶ Su amee nit ku ñu fekke kenn ciy bokkam, ku mu sàcce ci bànni Israyil, mu di ko jaamloo, mbaa mu jaay ko, su boobaa dee mooy àtteb kooka ko sàcc. Noonu ngeen di tenqee lu bon ci seen biir.
24.8: ¶ Fexeleen ba ci biir mbasum jàngoroy der juy màgg, ngeen di sàmmoo jëfe bu baax, mboolem lu leen sarxalkat yi, Leween ñi tegtal. Ni ma ko sante sarxalkat yi, Leween ñi, sàmmooleen koo jëfe noonu.
24.9: Fàttlikuleen la seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji defoon Maryaama ca yoon wa, ba ngeen génnee Misra.
24.10: ¶ Bu ngeen lebalee seen moroom, ak lu bor ba mana doon, buleen dugg biir néegam, di fa jël ab tayleem.
24.11: Ca biti ngeen di taxaw, ka ngeen di lebal yótsi leen ab tayleem ca biti.
24.12: Su dee ku néew doole, buleen tëraale ab tayleem.
24.13: Fexeleen ba delloo ko tayle ba bu jant biy so, ba mu tëraale mbubbum tayle ma, sante leen ko, mu dig njekk, fa seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
24.14: ¶ Buleen gàddu àqu liggéeykat, baadoolo bu néew doole ci seen biiri bokk, mbaa ci seen dëkkandoo yiy doxandéem ci seen dëkk yi ci réew mi.
24.15: Ci bés bi ngeen koy fey peyooram. Bu ko jant sowe, ndax néew doole la te moom la yaakaara dunde. Lu ko moy mu boole leen ak Aji Sax ji, ngeen gàddu bàkkaar.
24.16: ¶ Deesul teg waajur àtteb dee, ngir weccikoo ko doom ja, te doom it deesu ko teg àtteb dee, weccikoo ko waajur wa. Nit ku nekk, bàkkaaru boppam lees koy tege àtteb dee.
24.17: ¶ Buleen xañ dëgg ab doxandéem akub jirim, te buleen taylelu mbubbum jëtun.
24.18: Fàttlikuleen ne ay jaam ngeen woon ca Misra, seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji moo leen fa jote. Looloo waral man, ma sant leen ngeen jëfe ndigal loolu.
24.19: ¶ Bu ngeen di góob seenub tool, ba fàtte ab sëq ca tool ba, buleen dellu di ko jëli. Ab doxandéem akub jirim akub jëtun, ñoom la poraat may ñeel, su ko defee seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji barkeel leen ci mboolem seenu ñaq.
24.20: Bu ngeen bàccee seen garabu oliw ba noppi, buleen toppaat car ya, di witt lu ca des. Ab doxandéem akub jirim akub jëtun, ñoom la ndesit way ñeel.
24.21: Bu ngeen wittee seen tóokëru reseñ, buleen dellu, di ko wittaat. Ab doxandéem akub jirim akub jëtun ñoom la wittaat may ñeel.
24.22: Fàttlikuleen ne ay jaam ngeen woon ca réewum Misra. Looloo waral man, ma sant leen ngeen jëfe ndigal loolu.

25.1: ¶ Su ab jote amee diggante ay nit, nañu dem ca ëttub àttekaay ba, ñu àtte leen, ba ki am dëgg, ñu jox ko dëgg, ki tooñ, ñu teg ko tooñ.
25.2: Su dee ay dóor la ki tooñ yelloo, na ko àttekat bi tëral, ñu dóor ko ci kanamam, limu yar ba yemook tooñam.
25.3: Waaye ñeent fukki yar, bu ñu ko dóor lu ko ëpp, ndax dóor ko lu ëpp loolu, torxal seen mbokk ci seen kanam lay doon.
25.4: ¶ Buleen sunjuñ gémmiñu nag, te fekk koy bojj am pepp.
25.5: ¶ Bu ay góor yu bokk waajur dëkkee, kenn ci ñoom dee te bàyyiwul doom ju góor, jabaru ki dee du génn, di séy akub jaambur. Jëkkëru donaleem ju bokk ak jëkkëram moo ko wara jël, donloo ko.
25.6: Su ko defee bu ca ndaw sa taawloo góor, taaw ba saxal turu mbokkam ma dee, ba turam du fey ci biir Israyil.
25.7: Su waa ji buggula jël jabaru donaleem jooju, na ndaw sa dem ba ca mag ña ca bunt dëkk ba, ne leen: «Sama jëkkëru donale jii moo baña saxal turu mbokkam ci Israyil. Moo ma buggula donloo.»
25.8: Bu loolu amee na ko magi dëkkam woolu, wax ak moom. Su waa ji dëgëree, ne buggu koo jël,
25.9: na ko jabaru donaleem ja fekki ca kanam mag ña, daldi summi benn caraxu waa ji ba noppi, tifli waa ji ci kanam, ne ko: «Nii lees di def ku dul sampal mbokkam kër.»
25.10: Su boobaa tur wa ñuy dippee waa kër waa ja ci digg Israyil, di «Kërug summi carax.»
25.11: ¶ Su ay góor dee jàppante, ba jabaru kenn ki dikk, di sotle jëkkëram; bu jàppee ca ngóoray kay jàppanteek jëkkër ja,
25.12: dogleen loxol ndaw sa te buleen ko ñéeblu.
25.13: ¶ Buleen denc ci seen mbuus doju màndaxekaay ak moroom ma, te bii diis, bi ci des woyof.
25.14: Buleen denc seen kër nattukaayu sol-sotti ak moroom ma, bii réy, bi ci des tuut.
25.15: Doju màndaxekaay bu mat te dëggu ngeen wara am, te nattukaayu sol-sotti bu mat te dëggu ngeen wara am, ndax ngeen gudd fan ca réew ma leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji di jox.
25.16: Seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji kat seexlu na képp kuy def yooyii, képp kuy def ug njublaŋ.
25.17: ¶ Fàttlikuleen la leen Amalegeen ña defoon ca yoon wa, ba ngeen génnee Misra:
25.18: ñoo leen dab ci yoon wi, songe leen gannaaw, fàdd mboolem ña mujje woon, fekk ngeen sonn, loof, te ragaluñu ci sax Yàlla.
25.19: Bu ngeen demee ba seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji noppal leen ci mboolem seen noon yi séq réew, mi mu leen sédd, ngir ngeen nangu ko, nangeen far mboolem lu ñu doon fàttlikoo Amalegeen ñi fu asamaan tiim. Buleen ko fàtte.

26.1: ¶ Gannaaw loolu, bu ngeen demee ca réew ma leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji sédd, ba ngeen nangu ko, dëkke,
26.2: na ku nekk ci yeen sàkk ca ndoortel mboolem meññeefum suuf mu mu jële ca seen réew, ma leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji di jox, mu def ko ci pañe, yóbbu ca bérab ba seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji taamoo dëël turam ëllëg.
26.3: Na àgg ca sarxalkat ba fa nekk ci yooyu jant, ne ko: «Maa biral tey jii fi sa kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ne agsi naa ci réew mi Aji Sax ji giñaloon samay maam, ne moom la may jox.»
26.4: Na sarxalkat bi nangoo pañe bi ci loxoom, taaj ko fi seen kanam sarxalukaayu Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
26.5: Mu dellu nag wax fi seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ne: «Sama maam ab Arameen buy màngaan la woon. Mu dem Misra, sance fa mbooloo su néew, te mujj di askan wu réy, am doole te bare.
26.6: Waa Misra nag soxore nu, mitital nu, yen nu liggéey bu diis.
26.7: Ba loolu amee nu yuuxu, woo sunu Yàllay maam Aji Sax ji wall, Aji Sax ji dégg nu, gis sunu mitit, ak sunu coono, ak sunu notaange.
26.8: Aji Sax ji nag génne nu Misra ci dooley loxoom ak kàttanam, ci biir musiba mu réy, aki firnde, aki kéemaan.
26.9: Ba loolu wéyee mu indi nu fi bérab bii, jox nu réew mii, réew mu meew meek lem ji tuuroo.
26.10: Moo ma taxa indi nii ndoortel meññeefum suuf, si nga ma jox, Aji Sax ji.» Su ko defee mu taaj pañe bi fi seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, daldi sujjóot fi seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
26.11: Mu bége nag, moom ak Leween ñeek doxandéem yi dëkk ci seen biir, mboolem lu baax li ko seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji jox, moom ak waa këram.
26.12: ¶ Gannaaw bu ngeen génnee mboolem céru fukkeelub meññeef, ci atum ñetteel, yemook atum génne cérub fukkeel, gannaaw ñaari at yu nekk, nangeen ko jox Leween ñi ak doxandéem yi ak jirim yi ak jëtun ñi, ngir ñu lekk ba regg, fa ñu féete ca seeni dëkk,
26.13: te na ku nekk ci yeen wax fi seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ne: «Jële naa sama kër céru sellnga bi, ba jox ko Leween ñeek doxandéem yeek jirim yeek jëtun yi, noonee mu dëppook sa santaane bi nga nu dénk. Moyuma lenn ci say santaane, te fàttewuma ci lenn.
26.14: Lekkuma ci dara ci biir ab dëj, jëlewuma ci dara te fekk ma sobewu, te it sarxaluma ci dara ku dee. Sama kàddug Yàlla Aji Sax ji laa topp, noonee nga ma ko sante woon.
26.15: Ngalla geesool fa sa dëkkuwaayu sellnga, fa asamaan, te nga barkeel Israyil, sa ñoñ, barkeel suuf si nga nu jox, noonee nga ko giñale woon sunuy maam, réew mu meew meek lem ji tuuroo.»
26.16: ¶ Bésub tey jii seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji moo leen sant ngeen jëfe dogal yii, ak àttey yoon yi. Sàmmooleen koo jëfe seen léppi xol, ak seen léppi bakkan.
26.17: Aji Sax ji ngeen biral bésub tey, ne mooy doon seen Yàlla, te dingeen doxe ay yoonam, di sàmm dogali yoonam, aki santaaneem, ak àttey yoonam, tey dégg waxam.
26.18: Aji Sax ji it biral na bésub tey, ne yeenay doon ñoñam ñi mu séddoo, noonee mu leen ko dige woon, te ngeen di sàmm mboolemi santaaneem.
26.19: Moo leen di aj ba ngeen tiim mboolem xeet yi mu sàkk, ci wàllu bayre, ak tur ak teddnga, te moo leen di def askan wu sell, ñeel seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, noonee mu ko digee woon.

27.1: ¶ Ba loolu wéyee Musaa ak magi Israyil sant mbooloo ma, ne leen: «Sàmmleen mboolem santaane yi ma leen dénk bésub tey.
27.2: Bés bu ngeen jàllee dexu Yurdan, ba ca réew ma leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji jox, sampleen ay doj yu mag, ngeen diw doj ya weexal,
27.3: te ngeen bind ca mboolem kàdduy yoon wii, gannaaw bu ngeen jàllee. Su ko defee ngeen mana dugg ca réew, ma leen Aji Sax jiy jox, réew mu meew maak lem ja tuuroo, noonee leen ko seen Yàllay maam Aji Sax ji waxe woon.
27.4: Gannaaw bu ngeen jàllee dexu Yurdan, sampleen doj yooyu ca kaw tundu Ebal, ni ma leen ko sante tey jii, te ngeen diw doj yi weexal.
27.5: Nangeen fa tabax ab sarxalukaay, ñeel seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ab sarxalukaay bu ñu defare doj yu jumtukaayu weñ laalul.
27.6: Doj yu mat yu ñu soppiwul lenn ca na ñu bindoo ngeen di tabaxale ab sarxalukaay, seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ngeen def ca ay saraxi rendi-dóomal, ñeel seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
27.7: Defleen ca itam ay saraxi cant ci biir jàmm yu ngeen di lekk foofa. Ngeen daldi bége fa seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
27.8: Nangeen bind ca kaw doj ya, mboolem kàdduy yoon wii, ba mu leer nàññ.»
27.9: ¶ Ba mu ko defee Musaa ak sarxalkat yi, Leween ñi wax ak Israyil gépp, ne leen: «Yeen Israyil, neleen cell te déglu. Bés niki tey doon ngeen askan wu ñeel seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
27.10: Kon nag déggal-leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, te ngeen jëfe ay santaaneem, ak dogali yoonam, yi ma leen di dénk tey.»
27.11: Musaa nag sant mbooloo ma bésub keroog, ne leen:
27.12: ¶ «Giir yii may lim, ñooy taxawe kaw tundu Garisim, ngir ñaanal mbooloo mi, gannaaw bu ngeen jàllee dexu Yurdan: Cimyoneen ñi ak Leween ñi ak Yudeen ñi ak Isakareen ñi ak Yuusufeen ñi ak Beñamineen ñi.
27.13: Giir yii nag ñooy taxaw di rëbbe, fa kaw tundu Ebal: Rubeneen ñi ak Gàddeen ñi ak Asereen ñi ak Sabuloneen ñi ak Daneen ñi ak Neftaleen ñi.»
27.14: ¶ Leween ñi ñooy wax ak waa Israyil gépp, di àddu ca kaw, ne:
27.15: ¶ «Alku ñeel na képp ku sàkk, bay teg ci bérab bu làqu, li Aji Sax ji seexlu, te ab liggéeykat sàkke ko ay loxoom, muy jëmmu tuur mu ñu yett, mbaa mu ñu móol.» Su ko defee mbooloo mépp àddoondoo, ne: «Amiin!»
27.16: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku torxal baayam mbaa ndeyam.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.17: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku toxal màndargam kemu suufas moroomam.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.18: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku sànk silmaxa ci aw yoon.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.19: ¶ Ñu neeti «Alku ñeel na ku jengal àtteb doxandéem ak jirim akub jëtun.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.20: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku tëdde jabaru baayam, ndax suturas baayam la xàwwi.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.21: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku tëdde mboolem luy mala.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.22: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku tëdde ab jigéenam, muy doomu baayam, mbaa doomu ndeyam.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.23: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku tëdde yaayu jabaram.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.24: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku rey moroomam ci kumpa.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.25: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku nangub ger, ngir rotal bakkanu nit ku deful dara.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»
27.26: ¶ Ñu neeti: «Alku ñeel na ku saxoowul kàdduy yoon wii, di ko jëfe.» Mbooloo mépp ne: «Amiin!»

28.1: ¶ Su ngeen déggalee ba déggal seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ngir di sàmmoo jëfe mboolem santaaneem, yi ma leen di dénk tey, kon Aji Sax ji seen Yàlla, Aji Kawe ji moo leen di aj ci kaw mboolem xeeti àddina.
28.2: Barke yii yépp a leen di dab, sottiku ci seen kaw, bu ngeen déggalee seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji:
28.3: ¶ Barkeel a leen di ñeel ci biir dëkk, barkeel a leen di ñeel cib àll.
28.4: ¶ Barkeel ay ñeel seen meññeefum njurukaay, ak seen meññeefum suuf, ak seenug jur, seen jur gu gudd, ak seen jur gu gàtt.
28.5: ¶ Barkeel ay ñeel seenum witt, ak seenum xiiw.
28.6: ¶ Barkeel ay ñeel seen yoonu dem, barkeel ay ñeel seen yoonu dikk.
28.7: ¶ Aji Sax jeey def, noon yi leen di jógal, ñooy daanu fi seen kanam. Wenn yoon lañuy dikke, dal ci seen kaw, waaye juróom ñaari yoon lañuy awe, daw, jiitu leen.
28.8: ¶ Aji Sax jee leen di booleek barke bu wàccal seenum sàq, ak seen mboolem ñaq, te moo leen di barkeel ca réew ma leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji jox.
28.9: Moo leen di defal boppam askan wu sell, noonee mu leen ko giñale woon, ndegam sàmm ngeen seen santaaney Yàlla Aji Sax ji, di doxey yoonam.
28.10: Su boobaa mboolem xeeti kaw suuf dinañu gis ne turu Aji Sax ji lees leen di wooye, te dinañu leen ragal.
28.11: Aji Sax jee leen di xéewale, ngir baaxe seen meññeefum njurukaay, ak seenug jur, ak seen meññeefum suuf, ca réew ma mu giñaloon seeni maam, ne moom la leen di jox.
28.12: Aji Sax jee leen di ubbil mbàndam mu baax ma fa asamaan, ba bu jotee mu tawal seenum réew, boole ci barkeel seen mboolem ñaq. Yeenay lebal xeet yu bare, waaye yeen dungeen leb.
28.13: ¶ Aji Sax jee leen di def bopp, te du leen def ub geen, te kaw rekk ngeen di jëm, waaye dungeen jëm suuf, ndegam yeena ngi topp seen santaaney Yàlla Aji Sax ji ma leen di dénkal sama bopp bésub tey, di ko sàmmoo jëfe,
28.14: te mboolem kàddu yii ma leen di dénk tey, ngeen bañ koo moye ndijoor, mbaa càmmoñ, di topp yeneen yàlla yu ngeen di jaamu.
28.15: ¶ Waaye nag su ngeen déggalul seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, te baña sàmmoo jëfe mboolemi santaaneem, ak dogali yoonam, yi ma leen di jox tey, mboolem alkànde yii dina leen dab, sottiku ci seen kaw:
28.16: ¶ Dingeen alkoo biirub dëkk, alkoo àll.
28.17: ¶ Dingeen alkule am witt, akam xiiw.
28.18: ¶ Dingeen alkule meññeefum njurukaay, ak meññeefum suuf, ak jur gu gudd ak gu gàtt.
28.19: ¶ Dingeen alkoo seen yoonu dem, alkoo seen yoonu dikk.
28.20: ¶ Aji Sax jeey yebal fi seen biir, kumte ak tiitaange, ak mbetteel ci mboolem lu ngeen ñaq, ba ngeen yàqu, ba jekki sànku ndax seen jëf ju ñaaw ju ngeen ko dëddoo.
28.21: ¶ Aji Sax jee leen di langalal mbas, ba raafal leen ca réew ma ngeen jëm, ngir nanguji ko.
28.22: Aji Sax jee leen di dumaa woppi ràgg, ak yaram wu tàng, ak lakk-lakk, ak jant bu tàng jérr, ak maral, ak gàncax gu xuur, tegi liir, lépp topp leen ba ngeen sànku.
28.23: ¶ Asamaan si tiim seen bopp nag da naan sereŋ ni xànjar, suuf si ngeen teg seeni tànk, wow koŋŋ ni weñ gu ñuul.
28.24: Aji Sax jeey def seen tawub réew di suuf ak pënd bu bawoo asamaan, di yuriku ci seen kaw, ba ngeen sànku.
28.25: ¶ Aji Sax jeey def ngeen daanu fi seen kanami noon. Wenn yoon ngeen di dikke, song leen, waaye juróom ñaari yoon ngeen di awe, daw, te dees na leen seexlu ci mboolem nguuri kaw suuf.
28.26: Su ko defee seeni néew di poraatum mboolem njanaaw ak rabu àll, te kenn du leen dàq.
28.27: ¶ Aji Sax jee leen di dumaa taabi Misra, ak neewoy kërug suuf, ak yaram wu xas, ak ër yuy xasan te dungeen mana am pajam.
28.28: Aji Sax jee leen di dumaa ag ndof akug cilmaxa ak ngëlëmte,
28.29: ba ngeen di làmbatoo digg bëccëg ni silmaxa di làmbatoo cig lëndëm. Dungeen sottal seeni mébét. Dees leen di néewal doole, di foqati seen alal rekk, bés bu nekk, te kenn du leen wallu.
28.30: ¶ As ndaw, ngeen digool ab séy, keneen tëdde ko; ag kër, ngeen tabax, te dungeen ko dëkke; ab tóokëru reseñ, ngeen jëmbat, te dungeen ko jariñoo.
28.31: Seenu yëkk, ñu rendi, ngeen gis, te dungeen ci lekk; seen mbaam, ñu nangu ko ci seeni loxo, te du délsi ci yeen; seeni gàtt, ñu jébbal seeni noon, te kenn du leen wallu;
28.32: Seen doom yu góor ak yu jigéen, ñu jébbal weneen xeet ci seen kanam, ngeen di leen séentu ci neen bés bu Yàlla sàkk, te dungeen ci man dara.
28.33: Seen meññeefum suuf, ak mboolem seenu ñaq, xeet wu ngeen xamuloon a koy lekk, te dees leen di not ak a dëggaate rekk, bés bu nekk.
28.34: Dingeen mujj dof ndax lu buur seeni bët ngeen di gis.
28.35: ¶ Aji Sax jee leen di dumaa taabi óom, ak taabi yeel yu bon. Dungeen mana am pajam, te ci seen wewu tànk lay lawe, ba ci seen kaw bopp.
28.36: ¶ Aji Sax jee leen di diri, yeen ak seen buur bi ngeen fal, ba ca biir xeet wu ngeen xamuloon, yeen ak seeni maam, ngeen di fa jaamu yeneen yàllay bant ak doj.
28.37: Dees na leen mujj seexlu, di leen léebook a kókkalee foofa ca biir mboolem xeet, ya mu leen dàq jëme.
28.38: ¶ Jiwu mu bare ngeen di yóbbu tool, te lu néew ngeen cay ame, ndax njéeréer yee koy wat.
28.39: Ay tóokëri reseñ, ngeen jëmbat, sonn ca, te biiñ, dungeen ko naan, dungeen witt doom ya it, ndax sax yee koy lekk.
28.40: Ay garabi oliw ngeen di am ci seen réew mépp, waaye ag diw, dungeen ko diwoo, ndax seen doomi oliw ya day yolax.
28.41: Ay doom yu góor ak yu jigéen ngeen di jur, waaye duñu leen nekkal, ndax njaam lañuy duggi.
28.42: Seen gépp garab ak seen meññeefum suuf, soccet yee koy nangu.
28.43: ¶ Doxandéem bu nekk ci seen biir mooy yéeg tiim leen, ba ca kawa kaw, yeen nag ngeen di wàcc, ba suufee suufe.
28.44: Moom moo leen di lebal, waaye dungeen ko lebal. Moom mooy doon bopp, yeen, ngeen di geen.
28.45: ¶ Mboolem alkànde yii ñoo leen di dab, dal ci seen kaw, topp leen, ba ngeen sànku, ndax yeena déggalul seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ngir wormaal ay santaaneem, ak dogali yoonam, yi mu leen dénk.
28.46: Loolu mooy doon, ci seen biir ak seen biir askan, ba fàww, ay firnde aki kéemaan yu leen di àrtu.
28.47: ¶ Gannaaw yeena jaamuwul seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji ci mbégte ak xol bu sedd, keroog ba ngeen barelee lépp,
28.48: seen noon yi Aji Sax jiy yebal ci seen biir, ñoom ngeen di jaamuji ci biir xiif, ak mar ak rafle, ak gépp ñàkk. Aji Sax jeey teg yetu weñ ci seen ndodd, ba sànk leen.
28.49: Aji Sax jeey jógloo ci seen kaw, xeet wu sore, ñu bàyyikoo ca cati àddina, dikk ne milib nig jaxaay, te dégguleen aw làkkam,
28.50: xeet wu ñàng kanam te rusuñu mag, yërëmuñu gone.
28.51: Ñooy yàpp seenug jur, lekk seen gàncax, ba ngeen raaf. Duñu leen wacce dara; du pepp, du biiñ, dug diw, du doomu jur gu gudd ak gu gàtt, ba ngeen far sànku.
28.52: Dees na leen gawe ci seen dëkk yépp, ba seen tata yu kawe te dàbbliku, ya ngeen yaakaaroon ci seen réew mépp, màbb. Dees na leen gawe seen dëkk yépp, ci mboolem réew, mi leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji jox.
28.53: Dingeen mujj lekk seen meññeefum njurukaay, seen suuxu doom yu góor ak yu jigéen, yi leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji may, ndax gaw ba, ak tanc bu leen seeni noon tanc.
28.54: Góor gi gëna lewet ci yeen te xay lool dina xeelu mbokkam, xeelu jabar ju muy noyyee, ak ndesu doomam ju mu dese,
28.55: ngir baña sédd kenn ci ñoom ci yàppu doomam ya muy lekk, ndax du dese dara ca biir gaw ba, ak tanc ba leen seeni noon tanc, ci seen dëkk yépp.
28.56: Jigéen ju gëna lewet te xay ci yeen, ba néegula teg ndëggul tànkam ci suuf ndax xayteem ak lewetaayam, dina xeelu jëkkëram ju muy noyyee, ak doomam ju góor ak ju jigéen.
28.57: Day fekk mu namma lekk ci kumpa doom ju mu doora wasin, boole kook ànd ba, ndax lépp ay ñàkk ca biir gaw ba ak tanc, ba leen seeni noon tanc ca seeni dëkk.
28.58: ¶ Su ngeen sàmmoowula jëfe mboolem kàdduy yoon wii binde ci téere bii, ngir wormaal boroom tur wu màgg wii te raglu, seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji,
28.59: su boobaa Aji Sax ji dina réyal seeni duma, ak seen dumay askan, duma yu mag te yàgg, ak wopp yu aay te ës.
28.60: Mooy délloosi fi seen kaw, mboolem jàngoroy Misra yu ngeen ragaloon, ñu taq leen.
28.61: Te it mboolem wopp ak mboolem mbugal mu bindewul ci téereb yoon wii, Aji Sax jee leen koy yen, ba ngeen sànku.
28.62: Nit ñu néew ngeen di dese, te bare woon ni biddiiwi asamaan, ndax ñàkka déggal seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
28.63: Su ko defee noonee Aji Sax ji daan bége di leen baaxe ak a yokk, noonu la Aji Sax jiy bége di leen sànk ak a fàkkas, te dees na leen déjjatee ca réew ma ngeen jëm, ngir nanguji ko.
28.64: Aji Sax jee leen di wasaare ci biir mboolem xeeti àddina, cat ba cat, ngeen di fa jaamu yeneen yàlla yu ngeen xamuloon, du yeen du seeni maam, yàllay bant ak doj.
28.65: Ca biir xeet yooyu nag, dungeen fa astandikoo, dungeen fa am sax fu ngeen noppale seen téstën. Aji Sax jee leen fay teg fit wu rëcc, ak gët yu giim, ak xol bu jeex.
28.66: Seen bakkan ay nekk ci xott, ngeen dëkke tiitaangey guddi ak bëccëg, te seen ëllëg dootu leen wóor.
28.67: Ag suba ngeen ne: «Éy waay, bu doon ngoonati.» Bu ngoonee ngeen ne: «Éy waay, bu doon subaati!», ndax tiitaange lu ngeen di tiit, ak li ngeen di teg seeni gët.
28.68: Aji Sax jee leen di yeb ciy gaal, delloo leen Misra, yoon wu ma leen noon dungeen ko gisati, ngeen di fa jaay seen bopp seeni noon, ngir doon seen jaam yu góor ak yu jigéen, te kenn du leen jënd.
28.69: ¶ Lii mooy sàrti kóllëre, gi Aji Sax ji santoon Musaa ngir mu fasoo ko ak bànni Israyil, ca réewum Mowab, te bokkewul ak kóllëre ga mu fasoo woon ak ñoom ca tundu Oreb.

29.1: ¶ Ba mu ko defee Musaa woolu Israyil gépp. Mu ne leen: Yeena gis mboolem la Aji Sax ji def, ngeen teg ci seen bët, ca réewum Misra, ci kaw Firawna ak dagam ñépp, ak réewam mépp.
29.2: ¶ Nattu yu mag yooyu, ak firnde yeek kéemaan yu réy yooyu, yeena ci teg seen bët,
29.3: te taxul Aji Sax ji may leen xel mu ngeen ràññee, ak gët yu ngeen gise, ak nopp yu ngeen dégge, booba ba sunu jonni yàllay tey!
29.4: Aji Sax ji nee: «Maa leen jiite ñeent fukki at ca màndiŋ ma, seeni yére ràppul, seenu dàll ràppul.
29.5: Mburu, lekkuleen ko, biiñ mbaa geneen naan gu diis, naanuleen ko. Maa leen leel, ngir ngeen xam ne man maay seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji.»
29.6: Ba ngeen agsee ci bérab bii, Siwon buurub Esbon dikk, ànd ak Og buuru Basan, dikk dajeek nun, ngir song nu xare, nu duma leen.
29.7: Nu nangu seenum réew, sédd ko Rubeneen ñi, ak Gàddeen ñi, ak genn-wàllu giirug Manaseen ñi.
29.8: Sàmmleen nag sàrti kóllëre gii, di ko jëfe ndax yàlla ngeen baaxle ci mboolem lu ngeen def.
29.9: ¶ Yeena ngii tey, taxaw jonn, yeen ñépp fi seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, seen njiiti giir, ak seeni mag ak seeni kàngam; mboolem góori Israyil,
29.10: ak seeni tuut-tànk, ak seeni jabar, akub doxandéem ci seenub dal, seen gorkatub matt, ba ci seenub rootkat.
29.11: Yeena ngi tàbbi ci seen biir kóllëreg Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ak ci ngiñam, kóllëre gi seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji fasoo ak yeen bésub tey,
29.12: ngir def leen bésub tey, askan wi mu ñoñoo; moom ci boppam mu doon seen Yàlla, na mu leen ko waxe woon, na mu ko giñale woon seeni maam, Ibraayma ak Isaaxa ak Yanqóoba.
29.13: Aji Sax ji nee: «Du yeen doŋŋ laay fasool kóllëre gii, ak ngiñ lii.»
29.14: Yeen ñi taxaw ci sunu biir tey, fi sunu kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, ci ngeen bokk, waaye ñi dikkagul bay bokk ak nun taxaw fii it, ci lañu.
29.15: ¶ Yeen ci seen bopp, xam ngeen na nu nekke woon réewum Misra ak na nu jaare ca biir xeet ya ngeen jaare seeni réew.
29.16: Gis ngeen seen jëf ju jomblu, seen kasaray tuur ya: yëfi bant yeek yëfi doj yeek yëfi xaalis yeek yëfi wurus yi ñu àndal.
29.17: Kon nag, muy góor, di jigéen, ak làng gu mu mana bokk, mbaa giir, fexeleen ba kenn ci yeen du walbatiku, dëddu bésub tey, sunu Yàlla Aji Sax ji, di jaamuji yàllay xeet yooyu. Lu ko moy ab reen dina fëlle fi seen biir, meññal leen tooke ak wextan.
29.18: Jombul mu am ku dégg kàdduy ngiñ lii, tey nax boppam cim xelam, naan: «Jàmm rekk laay am, maa tey të,» ba tax ñax mu wow lakkaale mu tooy.
29.19: Aji Sax ji du nangoo baal kooku, nde su boobaa, sànjum Aji Sax jeey ànd ak fiiraangeem, tàkk ci kawam, te mboolem alkànde gi ñu bind ci téere bii day këppu ci kawam, te Aji Sax jeey far aw turam fu asamaan tiim.
29.20: Aji Sax jee koy seppee ci mboolem giiri Israyil, ngir sédd ko njekkar, na mu dëppook mboolem alkàndey kóllëre gi ñu bind ci téereb yoon wii.
29.21: ¶ Maas giy ñëw, seen doom yi leen di wuutuji yeen, ñook doxandéem yi jóge fu sore, bu ñu gisee mbugal yi ci réew mii, ak wopp yi fi Aji Sax ji woppale,
29.22: tamarax ak xorom, ak lakk gi ci seen réew mépp, ba du lenn lees fay ji, mbaa lu fay jebbi, mbaa genn gàncax gu fay saxe, mbete tastey Sodom, ak Gomor ak Atma ak Ceboyim, dëkk ya Aji Sax ji tas, ca meram ma ak sànjam ma,
29.23: su boobaa yéefar yépp a naan: «Ana lu waral Aji Sax ji def nii réew mi? Lu waral mii sànj mu tàng te réy?»
29.24: Ñu ne leen: «Li ko waral mooy, dañoo fecci kóllërey Aji Sax ji, seen Yàllay maam, te mu fasoon ko ak ñoom ba mu leen jëlee réewum Misra.
29.25: Ñu dem nag, di jaamu yeneen yàlla, di leen sujjóotal, yàlla yu ñu xamuloon, te du lu leen Aji Sax ji féetale.
29.26: Moo tax sànjum Aji Sax ji tàkkal réew mii, ngir wàcceel leen mboolem alkànde yi ñu bind ci téere bii.
29.27: Aji Sax ji nag moo leen déjjatee seenum réew ci biir mer, ak xadar, ak sànj mu réy, ba sànni leen meneen réew, niki bésub tey jii.»
29.28: ¶ Mbir yi làqu daal, ñeel na sunu Yàlla Aji Sax ji, mbir yi feeñ nag, ñeel nu, nook sunuy doom ba fàww, te nu wara jëfe mboolem kàdduy yoon wii.

30.1: ¶ Ëllëg nag, su mboolem mbir yooyu dikkee fi seen kaw, muy barke yi, di alkànde yi ma teg fi seen kanam, su boobaa bu ngeen délloosee seen xel foofa mu leen fekk, ca biir mboolem xeet ya leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji dàq jëme,
30.2: ba ngeen dellusi ci seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, di ko déggal ci mboolem ni ma leen ko sante bésub tey, yeen ak seeni doom, te ngeen defe ko seen léppi xol ak seen léppi bakkan,
30.3: su boobaa Aji Sax jeey tijji seen wërsëg, yërëm leen. Seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji moo leen di dellu dajalee foofa, ci biir mboolem xeet ya mu leen tasaare woon ca seen biir.
30.4: Su ñu leen toxaloon ba ca cati asamaan sax, foofa la leen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji di dajalee, te fa la leen di jële.
30.5: Seen Yàlla Aji Sax jee leen di delloo ca réew ma seen maam moomoon, ngeen moom ko, te moo leen di baaxe, yokk leen ba ngeen gëna bare seeni maam.
30.6: Su boobaa seen Yàlla Aji Sax jee leen di xarfal xarafu xol, te mooy xarfal xarafu xol, seen askan, ngir ngeen soppe seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji seen léppi xol, ak seen léppi bakkan, ndax ngeen dund.
30.7: Su loolu amee seen Yàlla Aji Sax jeey teg mboolem alkànde yii ma leen limal, ci kaw seeni noon ak seen bañ yi leen toŋal.
30.8: Yeen nag dingeen walbatiku, di déggal Aji Sax ji, tey jëfe mboolem santaane yi ma leen di dénk bésub tey jii.
30.9: Ci kaw loolu seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji mooy baaxal mboolem seenu ñaq, ak seen meññeefum njurukaay, ak seen meññeefum jur, ak seen meññeefum suuf, ngir lu baax. Aji Sax ji mooy bégewaat di leen baaxe na mu daan bégee baaxe seeni maam.
30.10: Ndegam déggal ngeen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, di topp ay santaaneem, ak dogali yoonam, yi ñu bind ci téereb yoon wii; ndegam yeena walbatikoo seen léppi xol ak seen léppi bakkan, ba dellu ci seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji.
30.11: ¶ Santaane bii ma leen di dénk tey nag, jafewul te sorewul ba të leen,
30.12: Ajewul kaw asamaan ba ngeen naan: «Ana ku nuy yéegali kaw asamaan, àjjil nu ko, dégtal nu ko, ba nu jëfe ko?»
30.13: Nekkul it wàllaa géej ba ngeen naan: «Ana ku nuy jàllil wàllaa géej, jëlil nu ko, dégtal nu ko, ba nu jëfe ko?»
30.14: Kàddu gi kay jege na leen lool; ci seen gémmiñ ak ci seen biir xol la nekk, ngir ngeen di ko jëfe.
30.15: ¶ Kon nag gis ngeen ko: Teg naa fi seen kanam, bés niki tey, dund ak mbaax, teg naa fi seen kanam, ndee ak loraange.
30.16: Li ma leen sant, man, bésub tey, mooy ngeen sopp seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, di topp ay yoonam, di sàmm ay santaaneem, ak dogali yoonam, aki àtteem, ngir ngeen dund te yokku, seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji barkeel leen ca réew ma ngeen jëm, ngir nanguji ko.
30.17: Waaye su ngeen walbatee seen xol, dégluwuleen, xanaa ngeen lajj, di sujjóotal yeneen yàlla, di leen jaamu,
30.18: ma wax leen ko bés niki tey, su boobaa yeenay sànkoo sànku, te dungeen gudd fan ca réew ma ngeen di jàll dexu Yurdan, jëm fa, ngir nanguji ko.
30.19: ¶ Woo naa seede asamaan ak suuf ci yeen, bésub tey: dund ak ndee laa teg fi seen kanam, ak barke ak alkànde. Taamuleen dund ndax ngeen dund, yeen ak seen askan.
30.20: Soppleen seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, déggal ko te taq ci moom, ndax moom mooy seenug dund, di seen gudd-gi-fan ca réew ma mu giñaloon seeni maam Ibraayma ak Isaaxa ak Yanqóoba, ne ñoom la koy jox.

31.1: ¶ Gannaaw loolu Musaa dellu na àddu kàddu yii, wax ak bànni Israyil gépp.
31.2: Mu ne leen: «Maa ngi ci sama téeméeri at ak ñaar fukk, tey. Manatumaa jiite, te it Aji Sax ji moo ma wax ne ma: “Doo jàll dexu Yurdan gii.”
31.3: Seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji ci boppam moo leen di jiite jàll. Mooy fàkkas xeet yooyu fi seen kanam, ngeen nangu seenum réew. Yosuwe moo leen di jiite jàll, na ko Aji Sax ji waxe woon.
31.4: Aji Sax ji moo leen di def na mu defoon Siwon ak Og, buuri Amoreen ña, ak seenum réew, fàkkas leen.
31.5: Aji Sax jee leen di joxe fi seen kanam, ngeen def leen mboolem li ma leen santoon.
31.6: Dëgërluleen nag te am fit. Buleen tiit, buleen yox-yoxi ndax ñoom, ngir seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji mooy ànd ak yeen. Du leen ba, du leen wacc mukk.»
31.7: ¶ Ba loolu amee Musaa woolu Yosuwe, wax ak moom, Israyil gépp teg ci seen bët. Mu ne ko: «Dëgërlul te am fit, ndax yaw yaay ànd ak mbooloo mii ca réew ma Aji Sax ji giñaloon seeni maam, ne ñoom la koy jox. Yaw it yaa leen koy sédde.
31.8: Aji Sax ji nag mooy dox, jiitu la. Moom mooy nekk ak yaw. Du la ba, du la wacc mukk. Bul tiit, bul yoqi.»
31.9: ¶ Musaa moo bind kàddug yoon wii, dénk ko doomi Lewi yu góor, sarxalkat yay gàddu gaalu kóllërey Aji Sax ji, ñook magi Israyil ñépp.
31.10: Musaa sant leen, ne leen: «Njeexital juróom ñaareelu at mu nekk, àppook atum njéggalug bor, ci diiru màggalu Mbaar yi,
31.11: bu Israyil gépp teewsee fa seen kanam Yàlla Aji Sax ji, fa bérab ba muy taamuji, nangeen jàng kàdduy yoon wii fi kanam Israyil gépp, ñuy dégg.
31.12: Dangeen di dajale mbooloo mi, góor ñi ak jigéen ñi ak tuut-tànk yi, ba ci doxandéem bu nekk ci seen biir dëkk, ndax ñu déglu, ba tàggatu ci ragal seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, di sàmmoo jëfe mboolem kàdduy yoon wii.
31.13: Su ko defee seen doom yi xamul dinañu ci dégg, ba tàggatu ci ragal seen Yàlla Aji Sax ji, mboolem fan ya ngeen di dund ca réew, ma ngeen jàll dexu Yurdan, jëm fa, ngir nanguji ko.»
31.14: ¶ Ba loolu wéyee Aji Sax ji ne Musaa: «Ma ne, sa bésub dee ngi jegesi. Wool Yosuwe, te ngeen teewsi fi xaymab ndaje mi, ma yeb ko.» Musaa dem, ànd ak Yosuwe, ñu teewi fa xaymab ndaje ma.
31.15: Aji Sax ji nag feeñ ca xayma ba, ci biir taxaaru niir, taxaaru niir wa taxaw fa bunt xayma ba.
31.16: Aji Sax ji ne Musaa: «Yaa ngi nii di tëddi fa say maam. Mbooloo mii nag dinañu tàmbali di gànctuy topp yeneen yàllay doxandéem yu waa réew, ma ñu jëm ca seen biir. Dinañu ma wacc, fecci sama kóllëre gi ma fasoon ak ñoom,
31.17: te samam sànj dina tàkk ci seen kaw bésub keroog. Maa leen di wacc, làq leen sama kanam, te kon dees na leen lekk. Musiba yu bare aki njàqare dina leen dikkal. Bésub keroog ñoo naan: “Xanaa sunu Yàllaa nekkul ci sunu biir kay, ba tax musiba yii dikkal nu!”
31.18: Man nag maa leen di làqa làq sama kanam, bésub keroog ndax mboolem mbon gi ñu def, ndax ñoo walbatiku ci yeneen yàlla.
31.19: Léegi nag bindleen woy wii ma leen di dégtal, te yaw Musaa nga jàngal ko bànni Israyil. Woyloo leen ko, ndax woy wii di sama seede ak bànni Israyil.
31.20: Maa leen di yóbbu déy ca réew ma ma giñaloon seeni maam, fa meew maak lem ja tuuroo, ñu lekk ba regg, yaflu, daldi walbatiku ci yeneen yàlla, di leen jaamu, xarab ma, fecci sama kóllëreek ñoom.
31.21: Su ko defee bu leen musiba yu bare dikkalee aki njàqare, woy wii mooy biral kàddug seede fi seen kanam, ndax su boobaa xel du ko faaye, ba mu réer seenu askan. Ndax kat xam naa seen mébét mi ñuy rabat, te yóbbooguma leen sax ca réew ma ma leen giñaloon.»
31.22: Ba loolu amee Musaa bind woy woowu bésub keroog, daldi koy jàngal bànni Israyil.
31.23: ¶ Aji Sax ji nag yeb Yosuwe doomu Nuun ne ko: «Dëgërlul te am fit, ndax yaw yaay yóbbu bànni Israyil ca réew ma ma giñoon, te man ci sama bopp maay nekk ak yaw.»
31.24: ¶ Ba Musaa bindee kàdduy yoon woowu cib téere ba mu mat,
31.25: dafa yeb Leween ñiy gàddu gaal gi àlluway kóllërey Aji Sax ji dence, ne leen:
31.26: «Jël-leen téereb yoon wii, ngeen teg ko ci seen wetu gaalu kóllërey Yàlla Aji Sax ji, mu doon fa ab seede, ngir àtte leen.
31.27: Ndax maa xam seen jikkoy fippu, ak seenug dëgër bopp. Seetleen, ndegam bi may dundagum tey ci seen biir ngeen di fippu ci kaw Aji Sax ji, astamaak gannaaw bu ma deeyee.
31.28: Wool-leen ma seen magi giir yépp, ak seeni kàngam, ma wax kàddu yii, ñuy dégg, ba ma seedeloo asamaan ak suuf, ci seen kaw, ñoom.
31.29: Xam naa ne gannaaw bu ma deeyee, dingeen defa def ag yàqute, dingeen teggi yoon wi ma leen jaarloo woon, te musibaa leen di mujj dikkal, ndax yeenay def jëf ju bon ju Aji Sax ji ñaawlu, ba merloo ko ndax seeni jëf.»
31.30: Ba mu ko defee Musaa jàng kàdduy woy wii ba mu mat, ndajem Israyil ma mépp di dégg.

32.1: Yeen asamaan, teewluleen, ma wax, Yaw suuf, déglul sama kàddu yii.
32.2: Na samam njàngle sóob nib taw, samay kàddu rogalaat nib lay, ba tuurul am ñax, baawaanal gàncax.
32.3: Turu Aji Sax ji déy laay tudd, seedeleen sunu màggaayu Yàlla.
32.4: Kee di cëslaay, te mati jëf, wépp yoonam di njub. Yàlla ju am kóllëre, mucc njubadi, te njekk ak njub mooy boroom.
32.5: Njabootam ñoo def ug yàqute ci kawam, ba dootuñuy doomam ndax seeni sikk. Ndaw maas gu dëng te njublaŋ!
32.6: Aji Sax ji lañuy feye lii? Ndaw xeet wu dofe te ñàkk xel! Mooy seen baay, bind leen, sàkk leen, samp leen.
32.7: Fàttlikuleen jant ya jëkkoon, baleen xel maasi maas ya woon. Laajleen seeni baay, ñu xamal leen; ak seen mag ñi, ñu wax leen.
32.8: Ba Aji Kawe ji séddee xeet yi seeni suuf, tasaare doom aadama yi ci àddina, moo àppal xeet yi seen kemi réew, na mu dëppook limeefu goney Yàlla yi.
32.9: Céru Aji Sax ji moo di ñoñam, askanu Yanqóoba woowooy wàllam.
32.10: Moo leen fekk réewum màndiŋ, fu ne wëyëŋ, ubaleeki sab, mu feg leen, topptoo leen, sàmm leen, ni bu ñu doon peru bëtu boppam.
32.11: Moo mel ni jaxaay juy naawtal am tostanam, daayaarlu, tiim leen, tàllali laafam, aw leen, teg ciw dunqam, boot leen.
32.12: Aji Sax ji doŋŋ a leen wommat, du yàllay jaambur ju ko ci fekk.
32.13: Moo leen waral kawtey réew ma, ñuy xontoo meññeefum àll bi, mu di leen nàmpale lem ju walew doj, ak diw gu balle xeer wu ne sereŋ,
32.14: boole ca soowum nag ak meewum xar, nebbonu mbote, kuuyi diiwaanu Basan aki bëy, teg ca ngëneeli pepp, may leen biiñu reseñ ju xonq curr, ngeen naan.
32.15: Yeen Yesurun, yeena yaflu, waŋŋeetu, solu yaram, ne faaj, ne fuux, fàtte Yàlla mi leen sàkk, faaleedi seen cëslaay li leen musal.
32.16: Ñoo yee fiiraangeem, ndax ay yàllay doxandéem, ñoo ko merloo ak seen tuur yu jomblu.
32.17: Ñoo sarxalal ay rab yu dul Yàlla; ay yàlla yu ñu masula xam, yu bees yu doora xew, yu seeni maam ràññeewuloon.
32.18: Cëslaay li leen meññ ngeen foñ, Yàlla ji leen jur ngeen fàtte.
32.19: Aji Sax jee gis loolu, gedd, ndax mere doomam yooyu, góor ak jigéen.
32.20: Mu ne: «Maa leen di xañ sama kanam, ba gis nu ñuy mujje, ndax maasug defkati njekkar lañu, doom yu ñàkk kóllëre.
32.21: Ñoo ma fiirloo ak yàlla yu dul tus, merloo maak seen tuuri neen, man it maa leen di fiireloo xeet wu tekkiwul dara, ci waasow naataxuuna laa leen di merloo.
32.22: Sawaraa ngay tàkke ca samam sànj, di lakke ba ca xóotey njaniiw, ba xoyom suuf ak meññeefam, ba jafal reeni tund ya.
32.23: Maay jal ci seen kaw ay musiba, maa leen di soqil, ba jeexal samay fitt.
32.24: Ñooy loof cib xiif, jeex tàkk ndaxi jàngoro, ak mbas yu metti. Ay selli rabi àll laay yebal ci seen kaw, boole ca daŋaru ndox-suuf.
32.25: Fa biti la leen saamar di xañey doom, biir néeg ya, tiitaange luy reye feelu ko, buubaale waxambaane akub janq, luy nàmp, ak boroom bijjaaw.
32.26: «Maa noon maa leen di fàkkas, ba far dakkal lu leen nit doon fàttlikoo.
32.27: Waaye reetaani noon laa ci ragal, lu ko moy seeni bañ juume ko, ba naan: “Sunu njàmbaar a!” te waroon ne: “Aji Sax jee def lii lépp!”»
32.28: Wii xeet wu gàtt xel te ñàkk xam-xam!
32.29: Su ñu muusoon, xalaat ci lii, ba xam nu ñuy mujje.
32.30: Ana nu kenn di dàqe seen junni, ñaar di fëxal seen fukki junni, te ka ñu yaakaar jaayu leen, te Aji Sax ji, laa ne, waccu leen?
32.31: Yaakaaru noon yi de melul ni sunu yaakaar, te loolu la noon ya àtte.
32.32: Seen reseñ a nga cosaanoo Sodom, ak tóokëri Gomor, doom ya di tooke, cëgg ya wex xàtt!
32.33: Seen biiñ daŋaru ninki-nànka la, ak tookey ñàngóor bu aay.
32.34: «Xanaa du loolu laa làq fi sama wet, ne ko ràpp fi samay denc?
32.35: Maay kiy feye, di añale, te bu jotee ñu fakkastalu, ndax seen bésub toskaree dëgmal, dogal ba buur, wutsi leen!»
32.36: Aji Sax jeey dëggal ñoñam, mooy ñeewante ay jaamam, bu gisee doole dëddu, ba kenn desul, dub jaam, dus gor.
32.37: Su boobaa da naan: «Ana seen yàlla ya, seen kiirlaay lañu daa làqoo?
32.38: Ñi lekk seen nebboni sarax, naan biiñ bi ñu leen di tuural kay, nañu jóg, boog, xettli leen, di seen kiiraay!
32.39: Kon gisleen ne man la, man doŋŋ, kenn du Yàlla ku dul man! Man maay rey, di dundal; di gaañe, di wéral; maay jàpp, te kenn du xettli.
32.40: Maay yékkati sama loxo jëme asamaan, giñ ne: “Ndegam maay dund ba fàww,
32.41: bu ma daasee sama saamar buy melax, ba ŋàbb ko ci saab loxo, di àtte, maay fey samay digaale, añale samay bañ.
32.42: Maay nàndal samay fitt deret, sama saamar di yàppe, deret di nàcce ci ku ñu jam, ak ku ñu jàpp, tey tuuroo ci boppi kilifay noon yi.”»
32.43: Yeen, xeet yi, tàcculeen ñoñam, deretu jaamam ñi lay feyul, pey gu muy fey ay bañam, ba jot suufam ak ñoñam.
32.44: ¶ Noonu la Musaa dikke, mook Yosuwe doomu Nuun, ba jaar ci mboolem kàdduy woy wii, mbooloo mi di dégg.
32.45: Gannaaw ba Musaa noppee ci jottli Israyil gépp mboolem kàddu yooyu,
32.46: da ne leen: «Defleen seen xel ci mboolem kàddu yi ma leen di artoo man, bésub tey, te ngeen sant seeni doom ñu sàmmoo jëfe mboolem kàdduy yoon wii.
32.47: Ndax kat du kàddug neen ci yeen. Mooy seenug dund! Ci gii kàddu ngeen di gudde fan, ca réew ma ngeen di jàll dexu Yurdan jëm fa, ngir nanguji ko.»
32.48: ¶ Ci kaw loolu Aji Sax ji wax Musaa bésub keroog boobee, ne ko:
32.49: «Doxal yéegi ca tundi Abarim gii, nga jàll ba ca tundu Nebo ca diiwaanu Mowabeen, ba janook Yeriko. Nga séentu nag réewum Kanaan mi may jox bànni Israyil, ñu jagoo.
32.50: Boo noppee, deel ca kaw tund woowu nga yéeg jëm, ba ñu tërali la ca say bokk, noonee sa mag Aaróona deeye woon ca kaw tundu Or, ba ñu tërali ko cay bokkam.
32.51: Li ko waral mooy yeena ma fecci worma ci digg bànni Israyil, ca ndoxi Meriba Kades, ca màndiŋu Ciin, ndax yeena wormaalul sama sellnga ci digg bànni Israyil.
32.52: Kon nag ci biti ngay séentoo réew ma, waaye foofa, doo fa dem. Doo dugg ca réew, ma may jox bànni Israyil.»

33.1: ¶ Ñaan gii nag la Musaa, góoru Yàlla ga ñaanaloon bànni Israyil, bala moo nelaw.
33.2: Da ne: Aji Sax ji Sinayi la bawoo, fenkale leen fa Seyir, naajali leen fa tundu Paran, ànd ak ndiiraani ñu sell ña, ndijooram ba indil leen melax.
33.3: Yaw kay yaa sopp xeet yi, sa ñu sell ñépp nga téyee say loxo, te ñoo topp say tànk, di taataan say tegtal.
33.4: Aw yoon la nu Musaa dénk, muy jagleb péncum Yanqóoba.
33.5: Yesurun am na buur, kera ba njiiti askan wa dajee, ba giiri Israyil bokk teew.
33.6: Yal na Ruben dund, baña raaf, yàlla buy nitam néew.
33.7: ¶ Lii nag moo ñeel Yuda. Mu ne: Éy Aji Sax ji déggal yuuxi Yuda te yóbbu ko ciy bokkam. Mooy jànkoontee dooley boppam, waaye yaa koy wallu ciy noonam.
33.8: ¶ Lewi la wax ne ko: Sa Tumim ak sa Urim, jumtukaayi tegtal ya, ñeel na góor gay sa wóllëre, yaa ko nattoo ca Maasa, joteek moom ca ndoxum Meriba.
33.9: Kee ne ndey ak baay: «Gisuma leen,» ay doomi ndeyam, ràññeewu leen, te doomam, xamu ko. Xanaa di sàmm say wax, di sàmm sa kóllëre.
33.10: Leween ñeey xamal askanu Yanqóoba say àtte, di won Israyil gii saw yoon. Ñooy taal cuuraay fi sa kanam, di teg saraxi dóomal ci sab sarxalukaay.
33.11: Éy Aji Sax ji barkeelal dooley gii giir, te bége aw ñaqam. Dammal ndiggal ña koy jógal, ba ay bañam duñu jógati.
33.12: Beñamin la wax, ne ko: Soppeb Aji Sax jaa ngi, keey dëkke xel mu dal fi wetam, mu di ko yiir bésoo bés, te diggantey waggam la dëkke.
33.13: Yuusufa la wax, ne ko: Yal na barkeb Aji Sax ji ñeel suufam, bawoo ca xéewali asamaan, dib lay, ak ndox mu lal xóotey suuf,
33.14: ak xéewali meññeef mu jant ñoral, ak tànnéefi gàncax yiy sax ci weeram.
33.15: Na barke bawoo fa kawtey tundi cosaan yu mag ya, ak xéewali tundi cosaan yu ndaw ya,
33.16: ak xéewali suuf ak la ko fees, ànd ak yiwu ka màkkaanoo ngarab sa doon tàkk, te wàccandoo ci kaw boppu Yuusufa; ak kaaŋi bokkam yay séddooy Aji Sax ji.
33.17: Taawub yëkk la, daraja mooy boroom, béjjén ya, béjjéni nagu àll la, ca lay butteendoo xeet yépp, ba ca cati àddina. Ñooñooy junniy junniy nit ca giirug Efrayim, ak junni ca giirug Manase.
33.18: Sabulon la wax ne ko: Yaw, Sabulon, bégeel say dem, Isaakar yaw, bégeel sa biir xayma.
33.19: Xeet yi la ñooñu di woo ca tund wa, te fa lañuy sarxee sarax yi war, koomu géej, ca lañuy nàmpe, booleek kumpay mbell yu làqu biir suuf.
33.20: Gàdd la wax ne ko: Barke ñeel na ku yaatal Gàdd. Ni gaynde la goore, te mooy xotat përëg akum kaaŋ.
33.21: Moo xool cér ba jëkka lew, jagoo ko, nde fa la wàllu njiit di xaar boroom. Moo fekksi njiiti askan wi, moo jëfe njekku Aji Sax ji, aki dogalam fi Israyil.
33.22: Dan la wax ne ko: Dan gaynde gu ndaw la, mooy tëbe fa diiwaanu Basan.
33.23: Neftali la wax ne ko: Neftalee ne xéew aku yiw, biibal barkey Aji Sax ji, te sowu ba bëj-saalum lay nangu.
33.24: Aser la wax ne ko: Yal na Aser gëna barkeel ci doom yi, ay bokkam baaxe ko, tànk yay xuuse ag diw.
33.25: Weñ ak xànjar la say xomb di doon, sa kàttan ànd ak saw fan.
33.26: Kenn du Yàllay Yesurun! Keey war asamaan, wallusi leen, war ay niir, ànd ak darajaam.
33.27: Yàlla ji sax fàww moo dib rawtu, përëgam bi sax dàkk di cëslaay, moo la dàqal ab noon ne la: «Jekklil!»
33.28: Israyil a ngi dëkke xel mu dal, walu Yanqóoba mee fegu, di wale réewum pepp ak biiñ bu bees, asamaan it di ko wàcceel ab layam.
33.29: Ndokklee, Israyil, ana ku mel ni yeen, askan wu Aji Sax jiy wallu, di seen kiiraay, di seen ndimbal, di saamar bi leen di sagal? Seeni noon a leen di loxal, te yeen, fa seen gannaaw ya ngeen di daagoo.

34.1: ¶ Ba loolu amee Musaa bàyyikoo jooru Mowab, yéegi tundu Nebo, ba ca collu tundu Pisga, wa jàkkaarlook Yeriko. Aji Sax ji nag won ko mboolem réew ma, diiwaanu Galàdd ba diiwaanu Dan,
34.2: mboolem diiwaanu Neftali, ak diiwaanu Efrayim ak Manase, mboolem diiwaanu Yuda, ba ca géej ga ca sowu,
34.3: ak wetu bëj-saalum, ak xuru Yeriko, dëkku tiir ya, ba ca Sowar.
34.4: Aji Sax ji ne ko: «Réew mii laa giñaloon Ibraayma ak Isaaxa ak Yanqóoba, ne leen seen askan laa koy jox. Won naa la ko, ba nga teg ci sa bët, waaye foofa, doo fa teg sa tànk.»
34.5: Musaa, jaamub Aji Sax ji nag dee foofa ca réewum Mowab, na ko Aji Sax ji tudde.
34.6: Mu rob ko ca xur wa ca réewum Mowab, fa janook Bet Pewor. Kenn xamul nag fu bàmmeelam nekk ba tey jii.
34.7: ¶ Musaa amoon na téeméeri at ak ñaar fukk, ba muy faatu, te ay bëtam naqariwul, dooleem jeexul.
34.8: Bànni Israyil jooy nañu Musaa ca jooru Mowab diiru fanweeri fan, fani dëj ba doora mat.
34.9: Fekk na Yosuwe doomu Nuun feese xel mu rafet, ndax Musaa moo tegoon ay loxoom ci kawam, bànni Israyil nag déggal ko, di jëfe na ko Aji Sax ji sante woon Musaa.
34.10: ¶ Ab yonent lukkeekootul ci Israyil, mel ni Musaa, ma Aji Sax ji xejjoo woon ba naan ko jàkk, mu ne ko jàkk,
34.11: ba ca mboolem firnde yaak kéemaan ya ko Aji Sax ji yebale woon, ngir mu def ko ca biir réewum Misra, ca Firawna ak jawriñam ñépp, ak ca biir réewam mépp,
34.12: ak itam mboolem doole ju màgg ja Musaa wone, ak jëf ju réy te raglu ja mu def, bànni Israyil gépp teg ci bët.
